description: All 5 composite tools use mirrored lead-in descriptions. Read_file mirrors the built-in read tool's exact opening text.

variants.description: Read a file or directory from the local filesystem. If the path does not exist, an error is returned. Supports offset/limit for partial reads.
variants.hypothesis: Mirrored lead-in from built-in read tool + additive offset/limit differentiator.

companion_descriptions.write_file: Writes a file to the local filesystem. Supports diff preview before commit.
companion_descriptions.edit_text: Performs exact string replacements in files. Supports undo via preview before applying.
companion_descriptions.find_text:
- Fast content search tool that works with any codebase size
- Searches file contents using regular expressions. Supports structured results with line numbers.
companion_descriptions.diff: Show or apply unified diffs of pending edits.
